title: Sune's Morning Mess
description: Test your understanding of the video and practise useful morning routine phrasal verbs and action verbs.

questions.question: What does “go off” mean in the video?
options: To start ringing or making noise suddenly
questions.answer: To start ringing or making noise suddenly
questions.explanation: An alarm goes off when it starts ringing.

questions.question: What does “slam” mean?
options: To hit something hard and fast
questions.answer: To hit something hard and fast
questions.explanation: Sune slams the alarm to make it silent.

questions.question: What does “stumble” mean?
questions.explanation: Sune stumbles because he is still half asleep.

questions.question: What does “shoot out” mean?
options: To come out very fast and suddenly
questions.answer: To come out very fast and suddenly

questions.question: What does “zone out” mean?
questions.explanation: Sune zones out while staring at himself in the mirror.

questions.question: What does “splash” mean?
questions.explanation: Sune splashes cold water on his face.

questions.question: What does “get tangled” mean?
options: To become twisted up and stuck
questions.answer: To become twisted up and stuck
questions.explanation: Sune gets tangled in his shirt.

questions.question: What does “rush” mean?
options: To move very quickly because you are short on time
questions.answer: To move very quickly because you are short on time
questions.explanation: Sune rushes out the door because he is late.

sections.title: Video comprehension
sections.instructions: Answer the questions about the story.

questions.question: What wakes Sune up?
questions.explanation: The alarm goes off and wakes him up.

questions.question: What happens when Sune squeezes the toothpaste harder?
options: He drops it in the sink
questions.explanation: The toothpaste comes out suddenly and messily.

questions.question: Where does Sune zone out?
questions.explanation: He zones out while staring at himself in the mirror.

questions.question: What problem does Sune have when he gets dressed?
options: He gets tangled in his shirt
He spills water on his clothes
questions.answer: He gets tangled in his shirt
questions.explanation: Getting dressed is a struggle because he gets stuck in his shirt.

questions.question: What does Sune realize at the end?
options: He forgot to brush his teeth
He is wearing the wrong shoes
questions.explanation: He steps outside, the door closes, and he realizes his keys are inside.

sections.title: Complete the sentence
sections.instructions: Choose the correct word or expression.

questions.question: Every morning, my alarm ______ at 7:00.
questions.explanation: An alarm goes off when it starts ringing.

questions.question: I was so tired that I ______ down the hallway.
questions.explanation: To stumble means to walk clumsily, almost tripping.

questions.question: He was late, so he had to ______ out the door.
questions.explanation: To rush means to move very quickly because you are short on time.
